title: BuilderPalette
description: A simple tool that lets builders create custom block palettes and quickly receive the blocks they need for building projects.
body:
# BuilderPalette

**BuilderPalette** is a lightweight building utility that helps Minecraft builders quickly organize and access the blocks they use most.

Instead of constantly searching through the creative inventory, you can create **custom block palettes** and keep all the blocks for your build in one place.

Perfect for **large builds, medieval projects, terraforming, and detailed interiors.**

---

## Features

• Create and manage **custom block palettes**
• Quickly browse and add blocks using the **in-game block browser**
• Instantly view all blocks used in a palette
• Clean and simple **builder-focused interface**
• Helps keep your **block styles consistent across builds**
• Lightweight and easy to use

---

## How it works

1. Press **P** to open the BuilderPalette menu
2. Create a new palette
3. Add blocks using the block browser
4. Use the palette while building to quickly access your blocks

No more scrolling through the entire creative inventory.

---

## Example Uses

BuilderPalette can help you organize blocks for things like:

• Roof block combinations
• Path and road blocks
• Wall and foundation blocks
• Interior decoration blocks
• Nature and landscaping blocks

This helps keep your builds **organized and visually consistent.**

---

## Compatibility

• **Fabric mod**
• **Client-side utility**
• Works in **singleplayer and multiplayer**
• Compatible with **vanilla servers**

---

## Planned Features

• Export / import palettes
• Community palette sharing
• More builder utilities

---

If you enjoy the mod or have suggestions, feel free to share feedback!
